dashboard.title: Quant Workstation
dashboard.subtitle: A-share quantitative analysis console and multi-service cluster monitor panel

spine.title: System Multi-Service Spine Health
spine.connecting: Establishing secure connection to trade_bot API service...
spine.error: API connection error. Verify backend container and network status.
spine.active: Market data synchronization pipeline active and aligned with API gateway.
spine.contract_desc: Backend and admin are aligned 1:1 using the unified standard API contract spine.
spine.db_desc: High-throughput hypertable layouts are active on the latest migration version.
spine.pipeline_desc: Celery worker nodes are orchestrating background quantitative analysis in real-time.

kpi.tracked_description: A-share securities synchronized in the local databases
kpi.dragon_tiger_description: Latest entries net buying volume by hot money and institutions
kpi.limit_up_description: Latest securities hitting the daily limit-up threshold conceptually
kpi.news_description: Cleaned and processed real-time financial market news streams

sentiment.description: Short-term hot money vs. yesterday's strong limit-ups orientation: {upPercent}% vs {downPercent}%

snapshots.no_dragon_tiger_data: No Dragon Tiger data available. Run synchronization to retrieve hot money intelligence.
snapshots.no_limit_up_data: No limit-up data available. Run synchronization to capture strong market trends.

news.no_news_data: No financial news stream available. Run synchronization to pull the latest market intelligence.

screeners.title: Quantitative Screeners
screeners.subtitle: Discover high-probability trading candidates from multi-factor rules.

strong_uptrend.description: Bullish trend continuation with heavy money inflow. Best for tracking leading trend-leading assets.

volume_breakout.description: Significant volume surge paired with short-term breakout. Ideal for capturing sudden momentum stocks.

pullback_watch.description: Solid mid-term trend with short-term volume contraction pullback. Awaiting secondary breakout opportunities.

tuning.title: Screener Tuning Parameters
tuning.subtitle: Fine-tune thresholds for price momentum, return margins, and volume breakout.

save_workspace.title: Save Screener Workspace
save_workspace.scanning: Running quant scanner across A-share master...
save_workspace.matches_found: Located {count} matches. Persist this workspace into an auto-updating candidate pool.

save.no_results: No screening results available to save
save.save_success: Successfully saved to Watchlists! Auto-refresh pipeline enabled.
save.save_failed: Save failed. Please verify database and API connection status.

candidates.title: Screener Candidate Cards
candidates.subtitle: Tap a card to inspect technical indicators, RSI heat, and TradingView candlestick histories.
candidates.no_candidates: No matching stocks found for the current screening rules. Try adjusting the parameters to expand the search.

list.title: A-Share Universe
list.subtitle: Browse the locally tracked and synchronized A-share stock pools.
list.error: Unable to load stocks. Please check connection.
list.no_stocks: No stock data available. Run stock list synchronization first, and drillable candidate pools will be displayed here.

detail.context_desc: You navigated to this security via a saved workflow.
detail.technical_desc: Shared analysis and scoring summary consumed by both admin portal and Lark Bot.
detail.signals_desc: Review detailed interpretations driving this security's quantitative ratings.
detail.kline_desc: Daily bars snapshot including SMA5, SMA20 overlay, and bottom volume histogram.
detail.profile_desc: Static master definitions from the Chinese A-share local database.
detail.no_analysis: Analysis summary is currently unavailable. Please perform market sync to populate stock analysis data.
detail.no_signals: No analytical signals recorded for this security yet.
detail.no_kline_data: No historical market data available. Please ensure that the main stock market list has been synchronized.

watchlists.title: Watchlist Candidates
watchlists.subtitle: Monitor, refresh, and drill down into candidate names with context.

summary.refresh_failed: Single candidate pool refresh failed. Please check the database connection.
summary.refreshing_batch: Scheduling background analysis tasks for batch synchronization...
summary.batch_success: Synchronized {count} candidate pools in batch, automatically updating the latest sector movement summaries!
summary.batch_failed: Batch scheduling synchronization failed. Please check backend and Celery worker status.
summary.load_failed: Watchlist data failed to load. Please go to
summary.first_watchlist_guide: to build and save your first quantitative watchlist candidate pool.
summary.no_watchlists: No saved watchlists found. Go to the Screeners page to screen and save candidates.
